testcase.name: @BeforeMethod setUp

testcase.name: testMaxPasswordLength

failure.message: expected [Password too long.] but found [Email ili lozinka nisu u redu.]

testcase.name: testSQLInjection

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //p[contains(text(),'Email ili lozinka nisu u redu')]' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
